query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN costo_por_unidad IS NULL OR costo_por_unidad = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sin_costo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN costo_por_unidad = '350' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_350,
  SUM(CASE WHEN costo_por_unidad = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_0
FROM anuncios 
WHERE cliente LIKE '%OPIOIDES%';

  SUM(CASE WHEN costo_por_unidad IS NULL OR costo_por_unidad = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sin_costo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN costo_por_unidad = '350' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_350,
  SUM(CASE WHEN costo_por_unidad = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_0
FROM anuncios 
WHERE cliente LIKE '%OPIOIDES%';
